command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute 
ALTER TABLE positionTargets 
  ADD COLUMN stopLossPct INT NULL COMMENT 'Stop loss as % of max loss (e.g. 200 = close when loss is 2x premium). NULL = disabled.',
  ADD COLUMN dteFloor INT NULL COMMENT 'Close when DTE drops to or below this value regardless of P/L. NULL = disabled.',
  ADD COLUMN closeReason VARCHAR(20) NULL COMMENT 'profit_target | stop_loss | dte_floor | manual';

ALTER TABLE autoCloseLog
  ADD COLUMN closeReason VARCHAR(20) NULL COMMENT 'profit_target | stop_loss | dte_floor | manual';
